title: Zalitherlauncher Boost FPS
description: A fully custom, lightweight modpack designed to maximize FPS, reduce lag, and optimize Minecraft performance on low-end devices and Android.
body:
![Boost FPS
(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59016c179738165d8f629ca10fbb897bf165308e_0.webp)

Welcome to **Zalitherlauncher Boost FPS**, an ultimate optimization pack designed specifically to maximize your Minecraft performance. Unlike other packs that just throw in random mods, this project was built entirely from scratch to ensure the highest level of compatibility, stability, and FPS gains.

### 🚀 Why choose this pack?
If you are struggling with low frame rates, stuttering, or high resource consumption, this pack is exactly what you need. It significantly improves how the game runs on low-end and mid-range devices, including Android setups.

### ✨ Key Features
* **Massive FPS Boost:** Optimizes rendering and game logic to push your frames to the limit.
* **Built From Scratch:** Carefully handpicked and configured from the ground up to prevent bloat and conflicts.
* **Lower Resource Usage:** Significantly reduces CPU and GPU consumption, letting your device breathe.
* **Optimized Chunk Loading:** Faster generation and loading of chunks without annoying lag spikes.
* **Clean & Simple Visuals:** Preserves the smooth gameplay feel while stripping away unnecessary visual clutter.

### 🎮 Who is this for?
Perfect for hardcore PvP players, massive survival worlds, and demanding servers where every frame matters. If you want stable FPS and less lag, this pack is for you.#Android
